feed.title: App Store Discounts（PT）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:206976450490868736+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:206907475259680768+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1850 201 1649 81
PT 1572 144 1428 9

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(PT)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: MyTracks: GPS Recorder
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：0,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 0,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Compras integradas

  • 300 Altitude Query Times：3,99 €
  • 100 Altitude Query Times：2,99 €
  • Lifetime Premium：9,99 €

Application Description

MyTracks is an app that helps you keep track of your location using GPS data. It's perfect for various activities like hiking, running, walking, biking, and more. This app uses advanced technology to provide precise measurements and calculations. Here's what you can do with MyTracks: - Track your route: Whether you're hiking, running, or cycling, MyTracks can record your path and show it on a map. - Save favorite locations: If there are specific places you want to remember, you can mark them as favorites in the app. - Import and export data: MyTracks allows you to import and export data in various formats such as CSV, GPX, KML, and KMZ. - Improve accuracy: You can take static GPS observations to get more accurate waypoints for your tracks. - Easy navigation: The app provides a waypoint guide on the compass, making it easy for you to navigate to specific locations. - Customizable waypoints: You can add waypoints manually or import them from your favorite locations. You can even add vectors with angle and distance. - Coordinate conversion: MyTracks allows you to convert between four different coordinate formats (Decimal, DMS, MGRS, UTM) at any time. - Additional features: The app displays glide ratio during recording, offers compass options in degrees or mils, supports MGRS Grid overlay on the map, and allows you to create routes to follow before starting your track. - Detailed records: You can view your tracks on a map and replay the route. The app provides detailed statistics about your track and displays the saved waypoints associated with each track. You can also change the color of your tracks for easier identification. Please note that using GPS continuously in the background can drain your device's battery quickly. If you have any feedback or questions, please feel free to contact us at miaozhi.ai@gmail.com

entry.title: Carcassonne – Tiles & Tactics
entry.summary:
Price: 5,99 € → 1,99 €
Inns & Cathedrals Expansion: 2,99 € → 1,99 €
Traders and Builders: 2,99 € → 1,99 €
The Princess and the Dragon: 2,99 € → 1,99 €
Winter and Gingerbread Man: 2,99 € → 1,99 €
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：5,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 5,99 €]）

Compras integradas

  • Inns & Cathedrals Expansion：2,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 2,99 €]
  • Traders and Builders：2,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 2,99 €]
  • The Princess and the Dragon：2,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 2,99 €]
  • Winter and Gingerbread Man：2,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 2,99 €]

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Compras integradas

  • The River：1,99 €
  • Inns & Cathedrals Expansion：1,99 €
  • Traders and Builders：1,99 €
  • The Princess and the Dragon：1,99 €
  • Winter and Gingerbread Man：1,99 €

Application Description

New version of the multi-awarded board game. Now in 3D. Includes improved AI, 3D landscape, new exclusive features. *** Carcassonne fits that opening game niche that every game group needs. -Tyler Nichols, Board Game Quest *** Carcassonne = Great game, great mechanics, great pieces, great fun! -The Board Game Family A TILE PLACEMENT GAME OF CREATING LANDSCAPES, CLAIMING AREAS, AND GAINING POINTS Discover or re-discover Carcassonne, the multi-awarded tile-based game in which players draw and place their tiles to build a medieval city. Place your cities, roads, abbeys or fields to enlarge your landscape, then place your followers, the meeples. Knights, robbers or farmers... Each meeple will help you control your territory and win points. But be careful, you will need all your best strategy and tactics to maximum your points! Place your tiles and your meeples wisely to stop your opponents and win the game. 6 EXPANSIONS: ENLARGE YOUR LANDSCAPE AND OPTIMIZE YOUR POINTS Thanks to the mini expansions ""The River"" and ""The Abbot"", you can embellish your landscape and vary your game to enjoy new ways to play! Double or even triple your points thanks to the new buildings in the Inns & Cathedrals expansion! And with the Traders & Builders expansion, score more points with the trading commodities and build faster with the builders! Discover the city of Carcassonne covered with a blanket of white snow in the Winter Edition... and look out for the Gingerbread Man and the bonus points he'll give you! Beware of the Dragon in ""the Princess and the Dragon"" expansion! He could eat your Meeples if you're not cautious. And be kind with the Princess: she might prefer you to other Meeples and toss them out of the cities! FEATURES • Accessible and tactical gameplay adapted from the award-winning Carcassonne board game • 6 expansions: - The River, the Inns & Cathedrals, the Traders & Builders, the Winter Edition and Princess & Dragon are all available to purchase from the Game Shop. - Unlock The Abbot for free using your Asmodee account. • Up to 6 players! Play against the computer in solo mode, face off your friends in Pass and Play or challenge players from around the world in online mode • There is no more 3 but 4 different behaviors you can chose before starting a game with AIs. They all propose a better challenge than the previous ones. Players who want to experiment a true challenge will play against the Conqueror AI who is the strongest AI of the game. • Try out the aerial top view to refine your strategy! • Additional strategic layers compared to the physical version: - field view which allows you to see the field possession of each player - remaining tile list: allows you to see the tiles which are remaining in the draw pile Languages available: English, French, German, Italian, Spanish You can follow us on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram and You Tube! Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/asmodeedigital/ Twitter: https://twitter.com/asmodeedigital Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/asmodeedigital/ You Tube: https://www.youtube.com/asmodeedigital

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Hero Emblems II
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：7,99 € → 2,99 € [2,99 € ~ 7,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：2,99 €

Application Description

A new evolution of match-3, combat, and adventure! Hero Emblems II is a JRPG that combines elements of side-scrollers and match-3 games. Players control members of the Night Chasers, a group of heroic warriors, as they embark on an adventure to save their lands from an evil threat. [Game Features] ◆ Thrilling match-3 battle experiences Match three Emblems to clear them from the board and make your heroes attack. Clear four or more to generate Magic Emblems, allowing your heroes to unleash powerful skills. Perform combos to launch even more powerful attacks and vanquish your enemies! ◆ Traditional JRPG experience In a world of magic and swordplay, players will control members of the Night Chasers as they embark on an adventure together. Enter deep caves, explore ancient ruins, unlock treasure chests, fight against ferocious monsters, upgrade your equipment in town, and gain new information from villagers in the local taverns. A exciting RPG experience is waiting for you in Hero Emblems II! ◆ Substitute Heroes Each Hero possesses their own unique skills and backstory. There's Zack, the Human Warrior; Lucien, the Marten Knight; Sid, the Felinian Black Mage; Abner the Bard, and many more! Lead your favorite heroes into battle! ◆ Thrilling Japanese character voices in battles Personalized character voices make combat a thrilling, intense and fun experience! ◆ More equipment Enemies attack with a wide range of debuffs such as Poison, Ignition, Petrification or Curses. To fight against these tough opponents, you will need to choose your Heroes' weapons and armor carefully, and make good use of accessories to resist enemy debuffs and boost your Heroes' abilities! ◆'Food Consumption System' for Enhancing Battle Power A hero's adventure is always brimming with all sorts of challenges. Vicious monsters boast tremendous strength and always catch people off guard with their varied attack styles. Now, heroes can boost their abilities by indulging in delightful delicacies, allowing them to thwart monster attacks with a more refreshing rhythm! ◆One-time payment, IAP-free, and ad-free A New Chapter in the Night Chasers' History A long time ago, there was a mercenary group known as the Night Chasers. Instead of making money, these heroic warriors went around helping those in need. During the war, they helped a great many people who were suffering under tyranny and injustice. However, in the ensuing age of peace, the Night Chasers were no longer needed, and were forced to disband. Years later, four young people - Zack, Lucien, Sid, and Odelia - decided to carry on their legacy, forming the new Night Chasers. One day, Zack and his party save an Elven girl named Dolores. Suffering from amnesia, Dolores cannot remember why she has ventured so far from the Elven Kingdom – only that she has been sent on an urgent quest. Concerned for her well-being, the Night Chasers take her into their fold, leading them to discover an ancient and terrible threat to the kingdom... ** Recommend to use iPhone 6/iPad min4/iPad Air2/iPad 5th Gen./iPad Pro or later devices for better experiences.**

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Afterplace
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：7,99 € → 1,99 € [0,99 € ~ 7,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Application Description

An open world adventure game filled with silly characters and terrible secrets. Afterplace is an adventurous indie game for mobile devices. It's a huge open world, full of hidden secrets, treasures, and creatures. You'll run around the woods, fight monsters, and talk to ostensibly shady characters! All from your pocket! Be warned though - you never know what the forest might be hiding, and not all trails are paved. Labyrinths and dungeons are tucked away in the most concealed nooks. There are no waypoints in Afterplace. You'll have to forge your own path. Afterplace has been designed from the ground up to be a fast, fluid, beautiful experience for mobile. There are no virtual buttons. You can move and attack by touching anywhere. You can tap objects directly to interact or attack, use two thumbs like a traditional controller, or control the game with a physical gamepad. The game will adapt dynamically to your play style. Pick up and set down the game at your own pace, it will always save your progress. Afterplace is made to feel like a full-fledged indie adventure game that fits in your pocket. About the Author: Afterplace is made by one person, Evan Kice. A former software engineer from Austin TX, Evan quit his job (to the dismay of his friends and family) and has been working full time on Afterplace since early 2019. The initial game released in December of 2022, but Evan plans on continuing to support and polish the game when he can!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Titan Quest HD
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：9,99 € → 2,99 € [0,99 € ~ 9,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：2,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Immortal Throne DLC：4,99 €
  • Ragnarök DLC：4,99 €
  • Atlantis DLC：4,99 €
  • Eternal Embers DLC：4,99 €

Application Description

Um dos melhores jogos de corta e massacra (hack-and-slash) agora no seu celular! Originalmente lançado para PC em 2006, Titan Quest é um RPG de ação em um cenário mitológico. Os Titãs escaparam da prisão e estão determinados em destruir a Terra. Os Deuses não conseguem impedi-los e será necessário um herói para liderar essa luta épica. A vitória ou a derrota determinarão o destino da humanidade e dos olimpianos. Você é esse herói! Crie o seu personagem, explore civilizações antigas como Grécia, Egito, Babilônia e China, e lute contra hordas de criaturas lendárias! Domine as artes de arco e flecha, esgrima ou magia e melhore seu personagem para destravar poderes incríveis! Descubra itens especiais para ajudá-lo a completar a sua missão: espadas lendárias, raios devastadores, arcos encantados e muito mais! Especialmente adaptado para dispositivos móveis, esta versão oferece novos recursos: ● Jogue sem anúncios! ● Uma nova interface sensível ao toque ● Jogabilidade sensível ao toque completamente redesenhada ● Gráficos de alta qualidade ● Um mundo enorme e disponível para explorar ● Ciclo dia/noite completo ● 80 criaturas mitológicas diferentes: Minotauros, Ciclopes, Górgonas e muito mais ● 1200+ itens para descobrir ● 30 classes de personagem diferentes ● 150 habilidades de personagem diferentes ● Hora da diversão colossal com mais de 60 horas ● Modos de dificuldade escalável: as armas e os inimigos correspondem ao seu nível de habilidade ● Dezenas de conquistas desbloqueáveis para descobrir ● Sem anúncios, sem microtransações. Misturando mitologia antiga com ação ininterrúpta, o Titan Quest é um clássico jogo de corta e massacra que oferece um ritmo rápido e intenso. Supere os desafios emocionantes e derrote os maiores inimigos de todos os tempos que estão tentando invadir o mundo dos dispositivos móveis! DLCs disponíveis como compra in-app: ● IMMORTAL THRONE - No DLC do Trono Imortal, você encontrará os maiores vilões da mitologia grega, enfrentará os ataques de Cerberus e se arriscará nas margens do Rio Styx. Você deve interpretar as profecias do vidente cego Tirésias, lutar ao lado de Agamenon e do Aquiles, além de usar os ardis de Odisseu para conquistar esta nova aventura sombria. ● RAGNARÖK - Nas terras desconhecidas do norte da Europa no Ragnarök DLC, você enfrentará os reinos dos celtas, dos homens do norte e dos deuses Asgardianos! ● ATLANTIS - Conheça um explorador no DLC de Atlantis e embarque em busca deste reino mítico. A chave está supostamente escondida no diário de Hércules. Dizem que o diário está localizado na cidade fenícia de Gadir. Comece uma jornada pelo Mediterrâneo Ocidental, incluindo a Arena do Tártaro para batalhas épicas! ● ETERNAL EMBERS - Invocado pelo lendário Imperador Yao, o Herói é chamado de volta ao Leste para lidar com uma ameaça demoníaca que está devastando a terra depois que o Telkine foi morto.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: 1941 Frozen Front Premium
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：2,99 € → 0,99 € [0,99 € ~ 2,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,99 €

Compras integradas

  • 60,000 Gold：9,99 €
  • 25.000 ouro：5,99 €
  • 700.000 ouro：99,99 €
  • 325.000 ouro：49,99 €
  • 125.000 ouro：19,99 €

Application Description

Lidere o exército alemão em ascensão rumo ao leste ou defenda a mãe Rússia lutando com os sovietes. Escolha a melhor tática de guerra e ganhe sua medalha de brilhante comandante do FROZEN FRONT! Participe de batalhas incríveis da II Guerra Mundial nessa nova e brilhante simulação militar da HandyGames™. SUA MISSÃO LUTE num frio de gelar os ossos no fronte leste de 1941! COMBATA as posições inimigas com tanques e infantaria! ATQUE os quarteis generais inimigos com poderosos bombardeiros! COLOQUE sua artilharia em terreno difícil! FORNEÇA suprimentos e munição ao seu exército! DEFENDA-SE dos inimigos em maior número! - Jogue sem anúncios! - Ação estratégica com rodadas em ambiente da II GM - Campanhas emocionantes e missões cheias de desafio - Batalhas multiplayer onde a sorte é quem manda - Unidades históricas alemãs e soviéticas - Reparo, camuflagem e fortificação das unidades durante as batalhas - Infantaria, artilharia, tanques e aeronaves para as duas facções - Tabuleiro hexagonal para a melhor visão possível - Gráficos detalhadose sons super-realistas Obrigado por jogar 1941 Frozen Front!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Clouds & Sheep 2 Premium
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：2,99 € → 0,99 € [0,99 € ~ 2,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,99 €

Compras integradas

  • 1400 GEMAS：89,99 €
  • 650 GEMAS：49,99 €
  • 250 GEMAS：17,99 €
  • 120 GEMAS：8,99 €
  • 50 GEMAS：3,99 €

Application Description

O bando fofinho que todos adoram está de volta - e mais animados que nunca! Nesta esperada sequência do jogo “Clouds & Sheep”, as ovelhinhas fofas finalmente estão à solta de novo! Resolva inúmeras missões e atenda às necessidades dos amiguinhos lanudos. Plante pasto, flores, árvores e tosquie a lã de várias cores dos animais para abastecer seus recursos! Colete estrelas felizes, colha madeira e pétalas de flores e use-as para fornecer comida, acessórios, brinquedos e muito mais ao seu bando! Controle as nuvens e faça chover para que suas ovelhas nunca fiquem sem água fresca para beber! Se as ovelhas estiverem felizes e satisfeitas, elas logo terão pequenos cordeirinhos! Todos os animais precisam da sua atenção! As bolinhas de lã gostam de se divertir. Faça sua ovelha pular e use brinquedos diferentes como a cama elástica, a gangorra e o balanço para brincar com eles! Veja seus bichinhos interagirem entre si e observe as reações deles aos objetos que você lhes dá! Personalize a pastagem do bando com objetos divertidos e escolha entre diversos cenários como Velho Oeste ou Piratas. Veja seu bando correr por aí o dia todo e dormir junto à fogueira de noite. Faça tudo o que puder para manter as ovelhas felizes para evitar que se tornem grandes nuvens de algodão no céu. Recursos: - Jogue sem anúncios! - A incrível continuação do jogo de sucesso “Clouds & Sheep” - Comece uma aventura épica para encontrar a lendária Fonte da Juventude! - Jogo de simulação com adoráveis ovelhas - Cuide bem do seu bando - Crie lindos e belos cordeirinhos - Brinque com seus animais - Dê a eles vários itens e objetos - Cultive e colha diversos recursos - Tosquie suas ovelhas - Personalize sua pastagem - Controle o clima - Ciclo de dia e noite - Jogo de mundo aberto em 3D - Adequado para crianças e divertido para toda a família - Compatível comcontrole MFi! - Compatível com Game Center! Obrigado por jogar “Clouds & Sheep 2”! Fique de olho nas notícias e dê sua Entre em contato com a HandyGamesTM: http://www.handy-games.com Curta a gente no Facebook: http://www.fb.com/handygames Fique de olho no Google+: http://goo.gl/qkjngm Assine o nosso canal do YouTube: http://goo.gl/2Kq6yY Veja as novidades no Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/handy_games Siga-nos no Instagram: http://instagram.com/handygames © www.handy-games.com GmbH

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Townsmen Premium
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：2,99 € → 0,99 € [0,99 € ~ 2,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Pacote de Prestígio pequeno：1,99 €
  • Pacote de Prestígio médio：9,99 €
  • Aceleração Ilimitada!：3,99 €
  • O dobro de XP, sem limites!：3,99 €
  • Pacote final Prestige：44,99 €
  • Pacote de Prestígio ótimo：24,99 €

Application Description

Transforme seu pequeno vilarejo em um enorme império medieval com uma economia em expansão e habitantes felizes! Encontre locais para mineração, cultive plantações em suas fazendas e colete moedas com os impostos sobre a população. Construa campos de combate, tavernas, mercados e embeleze a cidade com estátuas impressionantes, monumentos magníficos e jardins vicejantes. Mas também há perigos à espreita. Os bandidos estão na área, esperando para saquear e pilhar sua cidade pacífica. Construa um quartel para recrutar bravos soldados e torres de guarda para proteger seus cidadãos do perigo. Você administra todo o império do seu castelo, fazendo de tudo que para que os habitantes divirtam-se e sejam felizes! Recursos: - Jogue sem anúncios! - Jogo de construção de cidades da época medieval - Habitantes fofos com suas próprias rotinas diárias - Simulação de economia complexa e cadeias de produção - Dezenas de prédios diferentes, para a cidade e para produção - Recurso militar opcional com soldados e bandidos - Estações relevantes e efeitos climáticos - Desastres devastadores como fogo, doença, seca e muito mais - Cenários diversos e tarefas cheias de desafio - Modo de jogo do tipo sandbox sem restrições - Compatível com Game Center!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Slay the Spire
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：9,99 € → 7,99 € [7,99 € ~ 9,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：7,99 €

Application Description

Unimos elementos de jogos de carta e roguelike para criar o melhor jogo solo de baralho que pudemos! Monte um baralho único, encontre criaturas bizarras, descubra relíquias com imenso poder e prove-se em Slay The Spire! Recursos: - Montagem de baralho dinâmica: escolha suas cartas com sabedoria! Descubra centenas de cartas para adicionar ao seu baralho a cada tentativa de subir o Spire. Selecione cartas que funcionam bem em conjunto para eliminar inimigos com eficiência e chegar ao topo. - Um Spire em mudança constante: toda vez que embarcar em uma aventura no Spire, a configuração dele se modifica. Escolha um caminho arriscado ou seguro, enfrente inimigos e escolha cartas diferentes, descubra novas relíquias - pode até lutar contra chefes diferentes! - Relíquias poderosas para descobrir: itens poderosos, conhecidos como relíquias, podem ser encontrados no Spire. Os efeitos dessas relíquias podem melhorar consideravelmente o seu baralho a partir de interações poderosas.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Stream Music Player
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：1,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 1,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Application Description

--- Special release price 50% off! --- Stream was created to give you a seamless listening, managing and syncing cloud music experience. It allows you to create a personal streaming service with cloud storage like Box, Dropbox, Google Drive, OneDrive and Yandex.Disk to save space on your device and have access to all of your music. How it works? Upload all music to your favourite cloud storage then use Stream to connect and enjoy your music anywhere. Add your music to your device without iTunes, easy and fast using local WiFi transfer or download music to your iPhone to play it without internet (Offline mode). It’s a multi-cloud system therefore you can stream lists of music regardless where they are stored. Access your favourite music across all your devices: iPhone, iPad, iPod library, Box, Dropbox, Google Drive, OneDrive, Yandex.Disk and your computer. Stream your music with in advanced and powerful media player. Music player: - Full featured media player - Sleep timer - Lock screen playback controls - Background music playback - Equalizer with BassBooster - Over 20 realistic EQ presets - Stylish audio Visualizer - Fine scrubbing - Album cover art Playlists: - Create your own playlists Media Library: - Import music from your iPod library - Tabs for Songs, Albums, Artists Manager: - Wi-Fi Transfer - Download and upload music, pictures, archives from - Box - Dropbox - Google Drive - OneDrive - Yandex.Disk - Move, rename or delete tracks & songs - Search by artist, title, album - Create and manage folders

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Tunable – Tuner & Metronome
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：8,99 € → 3,99 € [3,99 € ~ 8,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：3,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Pizza for Seth：12,99 €
  • Burrito for Seth：8,99 €
  • Donut for Seth：0,99 €
  • Coffee for Seth：2,99 €

Application Description

Join more than a million musicians and improve your playing with Tunable - Music Practice Tools. More than a chromatic tuner, tone & chord generator, metronome, and recorder, Tunable is a music practice coach that can help you play steadily, in tune, and on beat anywhere you go. Jam-packed with features to help with ear training, breath support, rhythm, timing, and dynamics, Tunable is easy to use yet feature-rich. Tunable tracks your playing habits and gives feedback to help you improve. Equipped with a unique “tuning history” display for viewing pitch as you play, an easy to use metronome and a handy audio recorder, Tunable is the perfect toolkit for beginning to professional musicians. Grab Tunable today and use in your next practice session, group rehearsal, band class, or live performance. Why are Broadway musicians, students at Juilliard, National Youth Orchestras and beginning instrumentalists using Tunable? GET FEEDBACK ON HOW YOU PLAY • It's like a music instructor in your pocket. Record a practice session and get a practice score with note graphs to help summarize your playing. LEARN TO PLAY IN TUNE WITH SUSTAINED PITCH HISTORY™ • Visualize how steadily you play or sing. The straighter the white line, the more consistent the pitch. IMPROVE YOUR EAR WITH TONE AND CHORD GENERATOR • Use the tone and chord generator to play and sustain chords with various tone options. Toggle between different temperaments to hear how they compare. KEEP TEMPO WITH AN ACCURATE METRONOME • See the pulse with a visual metronome. View subdivision and current beat, with a large display and (optional) visual flash. RECORD YOUR SESSIONS AND SHARE WITH EASE • Record practices and performances. Add reverb for a professional sound. Share recordings with family, friends, and teachers. FEATURES OVERVIEW TUNER • Large, colorful tuning indicator clearly shows when in tune (green fills the screen) • Clear, visual tuner with note, octave, cents (+\-), and frequency (Hz) display • Sustained Pitch History™ tuning display to see how you’re sustaining notes over time • Especially suited for wind instruments, strings, and vocals with note detection from Tuba to Piccolo • Adjustable A=440 reference tone • Create your own or change between Equal, Just, Pythagorean, and 15 other tuning temperaments TONE AND CHORD GENERATOR • Chromatic Tone Generator and Full Piano with multiple tone options • Play and sustain single notes or chords • Continues playing when the screen is locked or in the background METRONOME • Large number display with optional visual flash to see the downbeat and each subdivision • Adjust tempo, beats per measure, and subdivision to fit your needs • Accent or mute individual subdivisions • Sync metronome to nearby devices so they run at the same tempo and in time (via Ableton Link) • Select from over 30 metronome sounds • Tempo Tap (tap metronome center to set a tempo) • Continues playing when the screen is locked or in the background RECORD PRACTICE SESSIONS • Record and save unlimited recordings • Receive a score and individual note graphs per recording • Organize recordings into folders • Search by name to find past recordings • Easily share recordings and practice scores • Playback recordings at 0x - 3x speed AND MORE • Transpose notes to any instrument • 15 Notations to choose from • AppleTV/AirPlay mirroring • Dark and light themes • Siri Shortcuts access to common tasks Tunable is especially great with voice, wind, and string instruments: • Guitar, Ukelele • Piccolo, Flute • Oboe, English Horn, Bassoon • Clarinet • Saxophone • Trumpet and Cornet • French Horn • Tenor and Bass Trombone • Euphonium and Tuba • Violin, Viola, Chello, and Bass • Voice TESTIMONIALS • "The best tuner, metronome, and recorder on iOS and a pitch-perfect bargain for any musician." — MacLife • "Tunable shows musicians what pitch-perfect means as they play." — Engadget • "Tunable doesn't just tell you how you sound -- it shows you." — FastCoDesign

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Card.Note - 多彩卡片笔记
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：0,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 0,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Compras integradas

  • Card.Note Premiun：1,99 €

Application Description

Card.Note：小某书百万博主私藏推荐的手账类App 这是一款以卡片为主要设计理念的极简记事 App ； 你写的每一段文字都可以生成一张张精美的卡片 。 你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 也可以用它来写日记、清单、规划、要事提醒； 还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。 「Card.Note」九大特点： 1.极简设计 循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。 2.文青定制 精选了 10 款记事字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。 3.全局卡片化 充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。 4.全局手势化 下拉可新建笔记，再下拉可保存笔记，右滑可呼出作品集，长按卡片可预览卡片内容。 5.语音录入 打开便可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。 6.要事提醒： 可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。 7.快捷高效 支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。 8.iCloud云同步 支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。 9.深色模式 全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。 感谢下载，生活愉快。 如有问题或建议，请联系开发者 微博：土味文艺开发者 邮箱：yande18@126.com

Application Screenshot

iPad

entry.title: Farming Simulator 20
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：6,99 € → 4,99 € [1,99 € ~ 6,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：4,99 €

Compras integradas

  • 1'000'000 Coins：2,99 €
  • 200'000 Coins：0,99 €
  • 500'000 Coins：1,99 €

Application Description

"Entra no mundo empolgante da agricultura com o Farming Simulator 20! Colhe muitas colheitas diferentes, trata do teu gado constituído por porcos, vacas e ovelhas, e cavalga nos teus cavalos, o que te permitirá explorar a imensa terra à volta da tua quinta de forma inédita. Vende os teus produtos num mercado dinâmico para ganhares dinheiro que poderás investir em maquinaria e na expansão da tua quinta. No Farming Simulator 20, controlas mais de 100 veículos e ferramentas criados fielmente das marcas líderes do mercado. Pela primeira vez nas plataformas móveis, terás à disposição a John Deere, a maior empresa de maquinaria agrícola do mundo. Trabalha com outras marcas famosas como a Case IH, a New Holland, a Challenger, a Fendt, a Massey Ferguson, a Valtra, a Krone, a Deutz-Fahr e muito mais. O Farming Simulator 20 apresenta um novo ambiente norte-americano, onde poderás desenvolver e expandir a tua quinta. Desfruta de muitas atividades agrícolas empolgantes, incluindo novas máquinas e colheitas, como o algodão e a aveia. O Farming Simulator 20 vem com os seguintes recursos: • Usa mais de 100 veículos e ferramentas realistas de alguns dos maiores fabricantes agrícolas • Semeia e colhe colheitas diferentes: trigo, cevada, aveia, canola, girassol, soja, milho, batata, beterraba-sacarina e algodão • Alimenta as tuas vacas e ovelhas para produzires e venderes leite e lã • Cuida dos teus cavalos e monta neles para explorares livremente o mundo à volta da tua quinta • Novos gráficos 3D exibem ainda mais detalhes das tuas máquinas e do ambiente norte-americano. • A vista da cabina permite-te conduzir os teus veículos de uma forma ainda mais realista do que dantes"

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Labyrinth City
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：5,99 € → 2,99 € [2,99 € ~ 5,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：2,99 €

Application Description

Labyrinth City: Pierre the Maze Detective is an adventure puzzle game for children and adults alike! Adapted from the award-winning children's illustration book series by IC4DESIGN and developed by Darjeeling, Labyrinth City takes you on a trip through a fantastic world of underground cities, hot-air balloons, tree-tops and haunted houses. Find your way through each interactive maze, engage with colorful characters, explore hidden pathways, unlock pieces of clues and solve the mystery along the way. 【The Story】 A new case has arrived for Pierre the Maze Detective! Mr. X has stolen the Maze Stone, which has the power to turn the whole Opera City into a maze. Help Pierre and his friend Carmen find their way through the mazes and stop Mr. X before it's too late! 【The Game】 You play as Pierre, Opera City's renowned maze detective, and you must retrieve the Maze Stone stolen by the notorious thief Mr. X! Without you, Opera City is doomed, as the Maze Stone has the power to turn everything around it into an intricate labyrinth. "Beautiful and cute puzzle games are fine and all," I hear you say, "but what about the challenge?". A fine question! In a maze, although there is only one true path to the exit, there are countless trails to hidden treasures and mini-games. So pay close attention while exploring Opera City and you will be pleasantly surprised. 【Features】 - Explore Opera City! Enter colorful worlds teeming with life and intricate details based on the best-selling children’s book series Pierre the Maze Detective by IC4DESIGN - Solve All Mysteries! More than 100 hidden objects and unique trophies to find, engaging puzzles and minigames to stimulate your brain - Interact With the Surroundings! Over 500 interactions possible with the characters, items, and background - Relive Childhood Memories! Each scene is based on a double-page illustration from the original work - Original soundtrack - Save the World! All levels are tied together by an overarching narration that will fill the detectives within us with purpose - Speaks Your Language! Available in English, Chinese (simplified and traditional), French, German, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, and Russian

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad
